detail.title: Smallest Common Region
detail.exampleTestcases:
[["Earth","North America","South America"],["North America","United States","Canada"],["United States","New York","Boston"],["Canada","Ontario","Quebec"],["South America","Brazil"]]
"Quebec"
"New York"
[["Earth", "North America", "South America"],["North America", "United States", "Canada"],["United States", "New York", "Boston"],["Canada", "Ontario", "Quebec"],["South America", "Brazil"]]
"Canada"
"South America"
hints: Try to model the problem as a graph problem.
The given graph is a tree.
The problem is reduced to finding the lowest common ancestor of two nodes in a tree.
